---
title: "Data Preparation"
description: "Data preparation in python including missingness, duplicates, fixing data types, relabeling, and more."
author: "John Robin Inston"
date: "2026-05-06"
date-modified: "2026-05-06"
toc: true
title-block-banner: false
sidebar: pstat100-notes
page-navigation: true
execute:
    echo: true
---
